curation_notes: Patch adds nil checks in three NGAP message handlers: HandleLocationReport checks AreaOfInterestList and LocationReportingReferenceIDToBeCancelled for nil before access; HandleNGReset adds a continue statement to prevent fall-through to a nil dereference after logging a warning; HandleUEContextReleaseComplete adds a continue when SmContext is not found to prevent nil dereference. All three are nil pointer dereference fixes consistent with CWE-476. Pre-assigned class null-deref is correct.
